description.en:
I currently work as a Frontend Developer
at Your Next Agency, creating efficient, user-focused interfaces for content-heavy web platforms.

responsibilities: Delivered frontend solutions across 20+ international projects in e-commerce, media, tourism and public sector domains.
Owned implementation of business-critical user journeys including registration systems, donation platforms, multilingual websites and e-commerce experiences.
Built accessible interfaces compliant with European accessibility requirements.
Modernized legacy Vue codebases through Composition API and TypeScript migrations.
Improved performance across multiple production applications through bundle optimization, caching and rendering improvements, achieving measurable PageSpeed gains and faster user experiences.
Collaborated directly with clients and stakeholders to define requirements and deliver production-ready solutions.
Migrated the company’s primary website to Nuxt and Headless WordPress, improving performance, SEO and maintainability.
Built and launched a new brand website with configurable marketing pages.
Replaced a SaaS-based training platform with Astro, improving performance and introducing Git-based development workflows.
Established a shared frontend architecture and design system across multiple company web projects.
